arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Gudmundsson acquitted in sexual misconduct trial
arts.sum: Albert Gudmundsson, the Fiorentina striker, has been acquitted of sexual misconduct charges by a court in Reykjavik, Iceland. The verdict comes after a trial stemming from allegations related to events that occurred in the summer of 2023. Sky Sport Italia report that the first-degree court ruling declared Gudmundsson innocent of the charges brought against him. The hearing was conducted behind closed doors to protect the privacy of the alleged victim. This decision marks a significant development in a case that has been ongoing since last year. The allegations had led to Gudmundsson’s temporary suspension from the Icelandic national team and The post Fiorentina’s Gudmundsson acquitted in sexual misconduct trial appeared first on FootItalia.com.
